title: CreatorRuntimePolicyResponseV1
description: GET /creators/:id/runtime-policy 200 response body. Exposes Creator-level policy capabilities for CLI consumption. SSOT: v1-spec platform/local-first-runtime-policy-v1.md §4, §7.

memory_structured_write.description: Whether memory structured write is enabled for this Creator (spec §4)

memory_vector_index.description: Whether memory vector indexing/embedding is enabled (spec §4)

local_first_embedding_remaining.description: Remaining embedding quota for local_first creators (null if not applicable or unlimited)
